tools.name: search_papers
tools.description: Search 200M+ scientific papers. Use 'topic' for predefined compliance searches (dora, mica, aml, etc.) or 'query' for free text.

tools.name: paper_detail
tools.description: Full paper details: abstract, TLDR, references, citations, PDF link.

tools.name: author_search
tools.description: Find researchers by name. Returns h-index, publications, affiliations.

tools.name: author_papers
tools.description: List papers by author. Use author_id from author_search.

tools.name: paper_recommendations
tools.description: AI-powered paper recommendations similar to a given paper.

tools.name: arxiv_search
tools.description: Search arXiv preprints — cutting-edge research before peer review.

tools.name: doi_lookup
tools.description: Look up any paper by DOI via Crossref. Metadata, citations, journal.

tools.name: compliance_research
tools.description: One-call bundle: peer-reviewed + preprints for a compliance topic. 20 topics available.

tools.name: citation_graph
tools.description: Explore citation network: who cites a paper and what it references.

tools.name: trending_research
tools.description: Most-cited recent papers in a domain. Great for literature reviews.
